The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $337,135,885Details
International Box Office $429,439,246
Worldwide Box Office $766,575,131
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $34,446,561
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $45,772,117
Total $80,218,678
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Katniss Everdeen is in District 13 after she literally shatters the games forever. Under the leadership of President Coin and the advice of her trusted friends, Katniss spreads her wings as she fights to save Peeta and a nation moved by her courage.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$121,897,634 (36.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.77 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,151 opening theaters/4,151 max. theaters, 7.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $492,453,670

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 21st, 2014 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: November 19th, 2014 (Wide) (Luxembourg)
November 19th, 2014 (Wide) (Finland)
November 19th, 2014 (Wide) (Denmark)
November 19th, 2014 (Wide), released as Jogos Vorazes: A Esperança - Parte 1 (Brazil)
November 19th, 2014 (Wide) (Norway)
Video Release: February 17th, 2015 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, some disturbing images and thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2340, 9/17/2014)
Running Time: 123 minutes
Franchise: Hunger Games
Cast, crew, or production detail: Posthumous Release
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion
Plot point: Romance
Social setting: Dystopia, Post Apocalypse, Rebellion
Source material: Young Adult Book Adaptation
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Color Force
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Katniss Everdeen is in District 13 after she literally shatters the games forever. Under the leadership of President Coin and the advice of her trusted friends, Katniss spreads her wings as she fights to save Peeta and a nation moved by her courage.
